title: Truffle Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and aromatic fried rice dish made with truffle and inspired by Indian cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add diced onion and sauté for 2 minutes.
Add uncooked rice and stir to combine with the vegetables.
Add truffle oil, fried rice seasoning, salt, and pepper. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a large serving platter.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped green onions if desired.
Optional: Add protein of your choice, such as cooked chicken or tofu, to make the dish more substantial.
